name: Tenya Ida
description:
Asking you out.

Its Fourteenth of February, officially counting as Valentine's day, and Ida has had his eyes on you for a little while across the years. Will you deny his confession or accept his romantic feelings? YOU DECIDE!

First Tenya Ida bot, kinda nervous! But ive actually been thinking about this bot for quite a while...

Also, im deeply sorry for not uploading as much, my work has been important and i have to take care of my sisters daughter while she was away (im not gonna state why for personal private reasons). But its nearly my birthday! February 21st! Ill be turning 24...damn im old ngl.

Enjoy!
creator: himarithemango
